name: Rajan Anandan
title: Managing Director
mentoring_style: Operator-first. Will challenge your assumptions on unit economics and market sizing.
known_for: Scaling internet businesses in India; bridging Silicon Valley thinking with India-specific realities.
bio: Rajan is Managing Director at Peak XV Partners (formerly Sequoia India). Ex-VP of Google India & SEA and MD of Microsoft India. One of India's most respected tech executives and investors.

name: Sharad Sharma
title: Co-founder
mentoring_style: Systems-thinker. Focuses on India Stack leverage and category creation.
known_for: India Stack advocate, UPI architecture contributor, building SaaS product thinking in India.
bio: Co-founder of iSPIRT Foundation, the think-tank behind India's digital public infrastructure. Former CEO of Yahoo India R&D.

name: Vani Kola
title: Managing Director
mentoring_style: Empathetic operator. Strong on team dynamics and culture building.
known_for: First female managing partner of a top Indian VC; backed Myntra, Dream11, Urban Ladder.
bio: Founder and Managing Director of Kalaari Capital. Previously founded two tech companies in the US with successful IPO. A pioneer for women in Indian venture capital.

name: Mohandas Pai
title: Chairman
mentoring_style: Direct and numbers-focused. Will ask hard questions on unit economics and governance.
known_for: Transformed Infosys HR and finance; now one of India's most active angel investors.
bio: Chairman of Aarin Capital and former CFO of Infosys. Active angel investor in 50+ startups, with a focus on EdTech and FinTech.

name: Sanjay Mehta
title: Founder & Partner
mentoring_style: High-energy, action-oriented. Loves helping founders find their first 10 customers.
known_for: India's most prolific early-stage investor via 100X.VC SAFE model.
bio: Founder of 100X.VC, India's first SAFE-based fund investing in 100 startups per year. Active angel in 200+ startups.

name: Rema Subramanian
title: Co-founder & Managing Partner
mentoring_style: Mission-driven. Focuses on business model sustainability and impact metrics.
known_for: Champion of Bharat-focused startups; backs companies solving problems for rural India.
bio: Co-founder of Ankur Capital, India's leading impact-focused early-stage fund. Former VP at ICICI Venture.

name: Kris Gopalakrishnan
title: Co-founder
mentoring_style: Strategic and long-term. Brings global enterprise perspective.
known_for: Co-founding Infosys; champion of AI research in India; Pratiksha Trust.
bio: Co-founder of Infosys and former CEO. Investor in 30+ startups with focus on AI and deep tech.

name: Pravin Jadhav
title: Founder
mentoring_style: Product-centric. Strong on user psychology and regulatory navigation.
known_for: Building PayTM Money from 0 to 5M users; WealthTech expert.
bio: Serial founder in FinTech. Built PayTM Money to one of India's largest mutual fund platforms. Now building Raise Financial.

name: Aprameya Radhakrishna
title: Co-founder
mentoring_style: Experimental. Encourages rapid iteration and Bharat-first thinking.
known_for: Building and selling TaxiForSure; pioneering vernacular internet with Koo.
bio: Co-founder of Koo (vernacular social media) and TaxiForSure (acquired by Ola for $200M). Expert in Bharat consumer behavior.

name: Avinash Raghava
title: Founder
mentoring_style: Community-driven. Great connector; will introduce you to the right people.
known_for: Building India's largest SaaS community; SaaSBOOMi Annual conference.
bio: Founder of SaaSBOOMi, India's most influential B2B SaaS community. Helped 200+ Indian SaaS companies go global.

name: Deepak Srinath
title: Founder
mentoring_style: Data-driven. Focuses on product metrics and scalable processes.
known_for: Building HR Tech products that went global from India.
bio: Serial SaaS founder with deep expertise in HR Technology and enterprise software.

name: Nandan Nilekani
title: Co-founder & Non-Executive Chairman
mentoring_style: Vision-first. Focuses on systems thinking and public good.
known_for: Aadhaar architecture; co-founding Infosys; designing India's digital stack.
bio: Co-founder of Infosys and architect of Aadhaar. Thought leader on India's digital public infrastructure.

name: Kunal Shah
title: Founder
formerly: Co-founder, FreeCharge (acquired by Snapdeal for $400M, then Axis Bank)
mentoring_style: Philosophically deep. Challenges you to think about delta-4 efficiency and cultural context.
known_for: FreeCharge acquisition; CRED; prolific angel investor; Delta theory of consumer behavior.
bio: Founder of CRED and co-founder of FreeCharge. One of India's most-quoted startup thinkers; angel investor in 100+ companies.

name: Vijay Shekhar Sharma
title: Founder & CEO
mentoring_style: Hustle-first. Grit over everything.
known_for: Building Paytm into India's largest payments company; surviving multiple near-collapses.
bio: Founder of Paytm, India's first fintech unicorn. Built a $6B payments empire from a small town in UP.

name: Sriharsha Majety
title: Co-founder & CEO
mentoring_style: Operations-obsessed. Deep diver on unit economics.
known_for: Scaling Swiggy from 0 to unicorn; building Instamart quick commerce vertical.
bio: Co-founder and CEO of Swiggy, India's leading food delivery and quick commerce platform.

name: Mekin Maheshwari
title: Founder
mentoring_style: Empathetic. Exceptional at hiring and culture, and early-stage product thinking.
known_for: Building Flipkart's product and engineering culture; now empowering next-gen entrepreneurs.
bio: Formerly CPO of Flipkart. Now founder of Udhyam Learning Foundation, focused on entrepreneurship education for youth.

name: Bhavish Aggarwal
title: Co-founder & CEO
mentoring_style: Vision-driven. Long-term thinking; not afraid of controversy.
known_for: Co-founding Ola; building India's first AI unicorn Krutrim; OLA Electric IPO.
bio: Co-founder of Ola and founder of Krutrim AI. Pioneer in Indian deep tech with focus on AI infrastructure and EV manufacturing.

name: Anupam Mittal
title: Founder & CEO
availability: Moderate — via Shark Tank or direct pitch
mentoring_style: Data and brand combined. Unique perspective on consumer trust and scaling.
known_for: Founding Shaadi.com; Shark Tank India judge; angel in 200+ startups.
bio: Founder of Shaadi.com and People Group. One of India's most visible angels via Shark Tank India.

name: Vineeta Singh
title: Co-founder & CEO
availability: Moderate — via Shark Tank or network
mentoring_style: Execution-heavy. Real about the grind of D2C scaling.
known_for: Turning down IIM placement to build SUGAR; Shark Tank India judge.
bio: Co-founder and CEO of SUGAR Cosmetics, a D2C beauty brand now present in 45,000+ outlets. Shark Tank India judge.

name: Namita Thapar
title: Executive Director
availability: Limited — via Shark Tank or Emcure network
mentoring_style: Finance-grounded. Focuses on business sustainability and cash flow.
known_for: Leading Emcure's turnaround; Shark Tank India judge; women entrepreneurship champion.
bio: Executive Director at Emcure Pharmaceuticals and Shark Tank India judge. Expert in healthcare and women entrepreneurship.

name: Peyush Bansal
title: Co-founder & CEO
availability: Limited — via Shark Tank or network
mentoring_style: Operational depth. Obsessive about customer experience and supply chain.
known_for: Taking Lenskart from startup to $4.5B valuation; omnichannel innovation; Shark Tank.
bio: Co-founder and CEO of Lenskart. Built India's largest eyewear company with 2000+ stores and global expansion to SEA.

name: Aman Gupta
title: Co-founder & CMO
availability: Moderate — via Shark Tank or network
mentoring_style: Marketing-obsessed. Focuses on brand positioning and aspirational marketing.
known_for: Building boAt into India's #1 wearables brand; Shark Tank India judge.
bio: Co-founder and CMO of boAt Lifestyle, India's leading D2C electronics brand. Shark Tank India judge with 100+ investments.

name: Ritesh Agarwal
title: Founder & CEO
mentoring_style: Resilience-first. Emphasizes learning from failure and rapid adaptation.
known_for: Founding OYO at 19; becoming world's 3rd largest hotel chain; Thiel Fellowship.
bio: Founder and CEO of OYO. Started at 19, became India's youngest billionaire. Expert in hospitality tech and global scaling.

name: Ghazal Alagh
title: Co-founder & CIO
mentoring_style: Consumer-first. Deeply understands millennial and Gen-Z buying behavior.
known_for: Co-founding Mamaearth and taking it to IPO; Shark Tank India judge.
bio: Co-founder of Mamaearth (Honasa Consumer). Took the D2C brand to a ₹8,000 Cr IPO. Shark Tank India judge.

name: Prashant Pitti
title: Co-founder
mentoring_style: Bootstrapper mentality. Champions capital efficiency and sustainable growth.
known_for: Bootstrapping EaseMyTrip to IPO without VC money; proving capital efficiency works.
bio: Co-founder of EaseMyTrip, India's 2nd largest OTA. Bootstrapped to IPO with minimal external capital.

name: Girish Mathrubootham
title: Founder & CEO
mentoring_style: PLG-focused. Product is everything; customer love drives growth.
known_for: Taking Freshworks to NASDAQ IPO; proving Indian SaaS can go global.
bio: Founder and CEO of Freshworks, the first Indian SaaS unicorn to list on NASDAQ. Built from Chennai to a $3B market cap company.

name: Shashank ND
title: Co-founder & CEO
mentoring_style: Long-term builder. Deep on healthcare regulations and trust-building.
known_for: Building Practo into India's largest digital healthcare platform.
bio: Co-founder and CEO of Practo, India's largest digital health platform with 20M patients.

name: Amit Ranjan
title: Co-founder
mentoring_style: Lean startup practitioner. Quick to identify PMF vs noise.
known_for: Co-founding SlideShare and selling to LinkedIn for $119M.
bio: Co-founder of SlideShare, acquired by LinkedIn for $119M. One of India's earliest successful internet exits.

name: Rajesh Sawhney
title: Founder
mentoring_style: Creative and contrarian. Loves big ideas and unexpected market angles.
known_for: Running GSF Accelerator, one of India's early accelerators; Reliance Entertainment.
bio: Founder of GSF Accelerator. Former President of Reliance Entertainment. Investor in 80+ early-stage startups.

name: Avnish Bajaj
title: Managing Director
mentoring_style: Marketplace expert. Deep on network effects and scaling.
known_for: Co-founding Baazee.com (India's eBay); backing Ola, Razorpay, Country Delight.
bio: Managing Director at Matrix Partners India. Co-founder of Baazee.com, acquired by eBay. One of India's most seasoned consumer internet investors.

name: Pallav Nadhani
title: Co-founder
mentoring_style: Bootstrapper. Will push you to think about profitability from day one.
known_for: Bootstrapping FusionCharts to $15M ARR without VC funding; developer-focused GTM.
bio: Co-founder of FusionCharts, a globally used data visualization library bootstrapped to $15M ARR.

name: Krishna Mehra
title: Co-founder & CTO
mentoring_style: Technical depth + business. Rare combination of CTO who understands P&L.
known_for: Building Capillary Technologies to serve 400+ global brands.
bio: Co-founder and CTO of Capillary Technologies, a retail-tech SaaS serving 400 global brands.

name: Subramanya SV
title: Co-founder & CEO
mentoring_style: Regulatory-aware. Strong on FinTech compliance and product design.
known_for: Building Fisdom as India's leading B2B WealthTech platform.
bio: Co-founder and CEO of Fisdom, India's largest B2B WealthTech platform powering 200+ banks and NBFCs.

name: Nikhil Kamath
title: Co-founder
mentoring_style: Contrarian. Will challenge your conventional wisdom on growth and capital.
known_for: Co-founding Zerodha (bootstrapped to $2B); WTF Fund; prolific podcast host.
bio: Co-founder of Zerodha, India's largest stock broker built without VC funding. Also runs True Beacon and WTF Fund.

name: Nithin Kamath
title: Co-founder & CEO
mentoring_style: Fundamentals-first. Long-term sustainable businesses over blitzscaling.
known_for: Co-founding Zerodha, India's most profitable startup; Rainmatter climate fund.
bio: Co-founder and CEO of Zerodha, India's largest stock broker. Built a $2B company without external funding.

name: Sanjit Singh Chawla
title: Partner
mentoring_style: Analytical. Deep on market dynamics and competitive positioning.
known_for: Early investor in Darwinbox, MediBuddy, Whatfix.
bio: Partner at Stellaris Venture Partners. Ex-Flipkart and Accel. Focuses on seed-stage B2B and consumer.

name: Mukesh Bansal
title: Co-founder
company: Myntra (acquired by Flipkart) / CureFit / Antler India
mentoring_style: Product + brand balance. Unique perspective on offline-online consumer journeys.
known_for: Co-founding Myntra and selling to Flipkart; building CureFit into India's largest fitness chain.
bio: Co-founder of Myntra (acquired by Flipkart) and CureFit. Now active at Antler India. Expert in consumer tech and D2C.
